title: rosa × dumetorum var. hirta
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. hirta, also known as the wild rose or prickly rose, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. hirta include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
